Workplace Mediation Case — Alex vs Maya Northwind (Test Fixture)

Alex Chen, a senior software engineer at Northwind Technologies, filed a formal grievance against 
Maya Rodriguez, the product manager overseeing their team. The dispute began in March 2024 when 
Maya reassigned Alex's project to another team member without prior consultation, citing delivery 
timeline concerns.

Alex stated that the reassignment was unfair, arguing that the project had been on track and the 
decision was made without proper process. Maya responded that Alex had missed two consecutive 
sprint reviews and that the client had expressed concerns about communication. Both parties 
acknowledged that their working relationship had deteriorated significantly over the preceding 
three months.

HR Director Sarah Okoye initiated a formal mediation process under the company's Workplace 
Conflict Resolution Policy. Alex's interests included recognition of technical contributions, 
procedural fairness in project assignments, and restoration of professional reputation. Maya's 
interests included maintaining project delivery commitments to clients, team cohesion, and 
management authority over resourcing decisions.

TODO: This is a test fixture. Real content should be 300+ words.
